body:
For homeowners in Pleasanton (and generally across the Bay Area), the standard recommendation is:

You should have your garage door professionally serviced **once a year**.

That’s the baseline most manufacturers and technicians recommend because garage doors are heavy mechanical systems with springs, rollers, cables, and an opener that all wear down gradually over time. Annual service helps catch issues before they turn into breakdowns. [How often should a garage door be serviced or maintained? - Garage Up](https://garageup.com/blog/2025/10/23/how-often-should-a-garage-door-be-serviced-or-maintained/?utm_source=chatgpt.com)[Garage Door Maintenance Checklist | Precision Garage Door](https://www.precision-door.com/garage-door-maintenance-checklist/?utm_source=chatgpt.com)

### When you might need service more often

Depending on how you use your garage door in Pleasanton, you may want **twice-yearly service** if:

  * You use it multiple times a day (family with several cars, main entry point)

  * The door is older (7–10+ years)

  * You notice noise, vibration, or slower movement

  * You live in areas with more dust, moisture, or temperature swings (which can add wear)

### What you should do between professional visits

Even with yearly service, it helps to:

  * Do a quick visual check monthly (cables, rollers, balance)

  * Lubricate moving parts every **3–6 months**

  * Test the auto-reverse safety feature occasionally

### Simple rule of thumb

  * **Normal residential use:** once per year

  * **Heavy use or older system:** every 6 months

If you want, I can also give you a quick checklist for what a technician should actually do during a proper garage door tune-up so you can tell if you're getting a good service.
